summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Forms integration system. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success rate) with all 11 forms endpoints functional including connection test, CRUD operations, permissions, duplicate detection, and manual sync. Frontend compilation issue fixed but authentication flow issues prevent complete UI testing.

authentication_issues.issue: Session redirects back to login page after successful authentication
authentication_issues.impact: Prevents testing of Forms UI components and integration

compilation_issues.issue: FIXED: Duplicate export default statements (line 38 and 1740)

passed_tests: Backend form permissions - Admin can see all forms
Backend duplicate resolution - add lead to waitlist
Backend automatic lead processing (30 leads created)
Frontend compilation after fixing duplicate exports
action_item_for_main_agent: Backend Google Forms integration is FULLY FUNCTIONAL with 100% test success rate. All 11 forms endpoints working perfectly including connection test, CRUD operations, permissions, duplicate detection (telefonszám alapján), and 4 resolution actions (keep_both, keep_existing, keep_new, merge). CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication/session flow issue that prevents staying logged in after successful authentication. This blocks testing of UI components: FormSettingsDialog, FormLeadsTab, DuplicateResolutionModal.
